title: poa tolmatchewii
intro: Poa tolmatchewii, also known as Ethiopian blue grass, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used in Ethiopian folk medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa tolmatchewii include the treatment of various ailments such as fever, headache, and digestive issues. Poa tolmatchewii is typically prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or decoction by boiling its leaves and stems to extract its medicinal compounds.
